facts.shortSummary: The party descends from the haunted bedroom into the old pirate bolthole beneath Perdoli Manor and scouts the cavern beyond.
facts.longSummary: After recapping Gaudin's deception of the pirate ghost and Petrona's name, the party enters the looted bolthole hidden beneath the master bedroom of Perdoli Manor. They confirm the chamber is an old pirate hideaway with a smashed tunnel to the north, organize a marching order in the dark, and send Acescale ahead to scout the wider cavern below.

location.context: the master bedroom and the hidden bolthole beneath it
location.notes: This is the trapdoor entrance to Grimstone's underground lair.

npcs.name: pirate captain's ghost
npcs.context: cursed guard in the bedroom above
npcs.notes: He cannot leave the bedroom and has just revealed Grimstone's route below.

npcs.name: Grimstone
npcs.notes: The ghost says Grimstone comes through the trapdoor to take victims.

facts.shortSummary: The party ambushes the undead pirate shades in the entrance cavern, wins, and learns how the hideout was destroyed.
facts.longSummary: Acescale reports seven undead pirates in the burned entrance cavern below, and the party engineers an ambush with light tricks, flight, and the steampup. They destroy the shades and shadows, examine the scorched skeletons, recover a melted silver-and-gold ingot, infer that a navy assault once burned the pirates alive here, and then take a short rest before pressing deeper.

location.context: the burned entrance cavern of Grimstone's lair beneath the bolthole
location.notes: The cavern still shows the remains of the pirate massacre.

npcs.name: undead pirate shades
npcs.notes: Five weaker shades and two stronger shadowy undead guard the passage onward.

items.name: melted silver-and-gold ingot
items.notes: Recovered from beneath one of the burned pirate skeletons.

organizations.name: Tollen Navy
organizations.notes: The party infers a past naval strike wiped out the pirates in this cavern.

mainEnemies.name: undead pirate shades
mainEnemies.notes: Primary foes in the entrance cavern fight.

mainEnemies.name: shadows
mainEnemies.notes: The stronger undead among the pirate remnants.

combat.notes: The entire undead cavern fight begins and ends within this beat.

facts.shortSummary: After the rest, the party finds Arturo in the next cave room and bluffs their way past him instead of fighting.
facts.longSummary: Leaving the scorched cavern, the party opens the incongruous wooden door into the next section of the lair and sneaks to a torchlit guard room where a burly human servant is working out. Gaudin and Loria improvise a story about bringing ingredients to Grimstone, Arturo nervously half-believes them, tries a basilisk draught on the steampup, and ultimately backs off while the party pockets empty vials and other alchemical gear.

location.context: the torchlit entrance hall and guard room inside Grimstone's lair
location.notes: This room has straw bedding, a punching bag, and three exits deeper into the lair.

npcs.name: Arturo
npcs.notes: He is fearful of Grimstone and confused by the party's deception.

npcs.name: Grimstone
npcs.notes: Arturo treats him as a violent alchemical superior whose orders must be obeyed.

items.name: alchemist's tools
items.notes: Arturo's room includes empty vials and salvageable alchemical gear.

facts.shortSummary: The party hatches risky plans, scouts Grimstone's lab, and finally tricks Arturo into a chase they turn lethal.
facts.longSummary: Back in Arturo's room, the group debates disguises, fires, fake alarms, and whether to draw Grimstone out before Gaudin briefly scouts the laboratory and confirms the masked alchemist is too absorbed in his work to come out easily. They pivot to one more deception, lure Arturo back into the caverns, ambush him in the corridor, and kill him so he cannot raise the alarm.

location.context: Arturo's guard room, the connecting corridors, and the first approach to Grimstone's laboratory
location.notes: The party is clearing the last obstacle between themselves and Grimstone.

npcs.name: Arturo
npcs.notes: He becomes the target once the party decides they cannot risk him warning others.

npcs.name: Grimstone
npcs.context: masked alchemist at work in the lab beyond
npcs.notes: Gaudin sees him through the corridor while testing the lure plan.

mainEnemies.name: Arturo
mainEnemies.notes: The party kills the guard to keep the lair contained.

combat.notes: The encounter is a short corridor ambush after a failed series of deceptions.

facts.shortSummary: After the break, the party settles on an invisible flanking plan and creeps back toward Grimstone's laboratory.
facts.longSummary: The table resumes after a real-world pause, chats briefly, and then reorients on the assault. They decide to send an invisible Loria forward to strip Grimstone's potion belt while the others wait just behind the bend, but the plan starts to collapse the moment she accidentally kicks a glass vial and Grimstone snaps to attention.

location.context: the corridor leading into Grimstone's alchemy laboratory
location.notes: The party is positioned just outside the laboratory threshold.

npcs.name: Grimstone
npcs.notes: He is at his workbench when the party makes its final approach.

items.name: potion bandolier
items.notes: The party specifically plans to disarm Grimstone by stealing or blasting his potion belt.

facts.shortSummary: Grimstone's lab fight erupts as the party swarms the masked alchemist and he answers with fire, poison, smoke, and animated stone spiders.
facts.longSummary: Initiative breaks out in Grimstone's cluttered laboratory as he hurls volatile potions while the party dives around benches and shattered statuary to pin him down. Acescale poisons him with ray of sickness, Loria slips under the bench to cut at his legs, Gaudin trades eldritch blasts with him, and the steampup leaps the table, but Grimstone still fills the room with smoke and animates the stone spider swarm before Loria finally cuts him down.

location.context: Grimstone's alchemy laboratory in the deepest part of the lair
location.notes: The room is crowded with workbenches, powders, potion gear, and damaged stone constructs.

npcs.name: Grimstone
npcs.notes: He fights with thrown potions while ranting about ruined experiments.

items.name: volatile potion bandolier
items.notes: Grimstone repeatedly uses the potions on his belt as grenades, smoke bombs, and animating reagents.

mainEnemies.name: Grimstone
mainEnemies.notes: Primary boss enemy in the lab battle.

mainEnemies.name: stone spider swarm
mainEnemies.notes: Animated construct unleashed during the fight.

combat.notes: This beat covers the opening and main body of the lab fight through Grimstone's death, but the constructs remain active afterward.

facts.shortSummary: Even after Grimstone falls, the party has to destroy the stone wasp, save Acescale from repeated petrification, and sort the surviving potions in the lab.
facts.longSummary: With Grimstone dead, the encounter stays dangerous as the last spiders and an animated stone wasp keep attacking, repeatedly dropping Acescale to zero with petrifying venom before Dilion and Loria finally stabilize the situation. Once the constructs are broken, the party identifies the lab's surviving stock, including healing draughts, anti-petrification potions, a potion of growth, a potion of advantage, a glowing poison recipe, and oil of slipperiness, then decides to rest before sweeping the final rooms.

location.context: Grimstone's alchemy laboratory after the boss's death
location.notes: The party remains in the lab while finishing the constructs and cataloging the spoils.

npcs.name: stone wasp
npcs.notes: It nearly petrifies Acescale with repeated poison stings.

items.name: anti-petrification potions
items.notes: Two doses can reverse petrification if used soon enough.

items.name: healing potions
items.notes: Some are safe, but at least one is poisoned.

items.name: glowing poison recipe
items.notes: A written formula for a poison that outlines targets in bright green light.

items.name: oil of slipperiness
items.notes: Recovered from a hidden spot in the lab.

mainEnemies.name: stone wasp
mainEnemies.notes: Final dangerous construct left after Grimstone dies.

mainEnemies.name: stone spider swarm
mainEnemies.notes: The last remnants of the spider construct are mopped up here.

combat.notes: This beat contains the final phase of the laboratory encounter after Grimstone has already been killed.

facts.shortSummary: After another short rest, the party clears Grimstone's remaining rooms, recovers Dilion's real dog and the treasure cache, avoids a mimic, and beds down safely for the night.
facts.longSummary: The party short rests, searches Grimstone's private notes on the Prime Arcana Stone, and then opens the storeroom where Dilion's flesh-and-blood dog is tied beside two treasure chests. They recover a key, the old book The Way of the Stone, pirate-route maps and valuables including Acescale's poker winnings, a ring of birdcalls, and a loaded gambler's die, realize the second chest is a mimic and back away, then settle in for a long rest in the cleared lair.

location.context: Grimstone's chambers, the treasure room, and the hidden lair before the overnight rest
location.notes: This beat covers the final room sweep and the safe long rest after the lair is secured.

npcs.name: Dilion's real dog
npcs.context: captive hound in the treasure room
npcs.notes: The flesh-and-blood dog is recovered alive from Grimstone's lair.

npcs.name: mimic
npcs.notes: The second chest proves to be a mimic, but the party backs away instead of fighting it.

items.name: The Way of the Stone
items.notes: An old book describing the Prime Arcana Stone and impossible alchemical recipes.

items.name: pirate hideout maps
items.notes: One map marks old pirate refuges that interest Gaudin.

items.name: ring of birdcalls
items.notes: Recovered from the treasure chest and claimed by Loria.

items.name: charlatan's die
items.notes: A weighted gambler's die that lets Acescale sense the result before it settles.

facts.shortSummary: At dawn the party slips out of Perdoli Manor, divides the spoils on the road down into the valley, and narrates their futures.
facts.longSummary: Early the next morning the party sneaks out through the chaos around Perdoli Manor while hobgoblins rage over Grimstone's disappearance and the goblins scatter. On the road down into the valley they divide their treasure, and each character sketches a future: Acescale plans a potion shop and gambling hustle with the charlatan's die, Gaudin starts chasing pirate leads from the recovered maps, Dilion heads back into the wilderness with two dogs, and Loria turns south again with her ring of birdcalls and a quieter sense of purpose.

location.context: the dawn escape from the manor grounds and the road down into the valley afterward
location.notes: This beat begins outside the cleared lair and moves into epilogue narration on the road away from the manor.

items.name: pirate hideout maps
items.notes: Gaudin's epilogue points toward future smuggling and pirate-route investigation.

items.name: ring of birdcalls
items.notes: Loria's epilogue explicitly centers the ring she recovered.

items.name: charlatan's die
items.notes: Acescale imagines using the die for future gambling schemes.
